class.name: EllipseWire
class.description: [EllipseWire] builds an analytic closed ellipse on an optional [CadPlane]. The ellipse is centered on the plane origin and uses the plane X direction as the major-axis direction.

method.name: build_ellipse
method.description: Builds an ellipse with [param major_radius] and [param minor_radius] on [param plane]. If [param plane] is omitted, the global XY plane is used.
